case_description:
TEAMS:
  - Team A has a team salary of $100,000,000;
  - Team D has a team salary of $90,000,000;
  - Team E has a team salary of $120,000,000.

PLAYERS:
  - Player A was the 3rd first-round pick of Team E in 2018 NBA draft when he was 19 years old.
  - Player A signed a 4-year contract (annual salary $20,000,000, 5% increase per year) with Team A during 2020 Moratorium Period.
  - Player B was the 12th first-round pick of Team A in 2008 NBA draft when he was 19 years old.
  - Player B signed a 4-year contract (annual salary $35,000,000, 5% increase per year) with Team A during 2020 Moratorium Period.
  - Player C was the 16th first-round pick of Team A in 2017 NBA draft when he was 19 years old.
  - Player C signed a 4-year contract (annual salary $10,000,000, 5% increase per year) with Team D during 2020 Moratorium Period.

ALL OPERATIONS PROPOSED IN THIS CASE:
  - A. Team D signs a 2-year contract with Player C providing annual salary $10,000,000 in the first Salary Cap Year (2024-2025) and 5% increase per year.
  - B. Team E signs a 4-year contract with Player B providing annual salary $17,000,000 in the first Salary Cap Year (2024-2025) and 5% increase per year.
  - C. Team A signs a 4-year contract with Player A providing annual salary $21,000,000 in the first Salary Cap Year (2024-2025) and 5% increase per year.

OPERATION UNDER ADJUDICATION: A
  A. Team D signs a 2-year contract with Player C providing annual salary $10,000,000 in the first Salary Cap Year (2024-2025) and 5% increase per year.
